summary: Backend-only smoke + regression on restored JK Products app. Core flows (auth, customers, products, items, orders, dispatch + same-day merge, payments, suppliers, supplier-ledger, settings, daily report, dispatch ledger + GR update, login attestations) ALL WORK correctly. Ran existing repo pytest suite (212 passed, 15 failed, 12 errors) — investigated every failure: NONE are real backend bugs except one — only the legacy `/api/voice/parse` endpoint is missing. Remaining failures are all stale test fixtures (hardcoded seed customer ID `c823afd1-8758-4d3e-a693-63a3a1c4738c`, hardcoded date 2026-06-12, expectations that contradict deliberate design choices currently in server.py).

critical.issue: Endpoint does NOT exist on the restored backend. Only `/api/voice/transcribe` (which requires an audio file) is implemented. Helper `parse_voice_order_with_items()` is defined in server.py:2549 and used internally by `/voice/transcribe`, but there is no HTTP route that exposes it for text-only parsing. The review request explicitly asks to test text-only `/api/voice/parse`. Add a thin POST `/api/voice/parse` endpoint that accepts `{text, customer_hint?}`, calls `parse_voice_order_with_items(text)` (and optionally `match_customer_from_voice(text)`), and returns the parsed structure.

minor.issue: DeprecationWarning: `@app.on_event("startup"|"shutdown")` in server.py:3338/3394 should be migrated to FastAPI lifespan handlers. Non-blocking but appears in every test run.

action_items: Mark the following existing tests as STALE FIXTURES — either skip, update seed setup, or rewrite to create their own data (NOT backend bugs): test_payments.py (uses SEED_CUSTOMER_ID `c823afd1-...` that no longer exists in fresh seed), test_dispatch_edit_delete_v26.py (same hardcoded customer), test_dispatch_ledger_v2.py (hardcoded customer + date 2026-06-12), test_iteration_21_private_mark.py (hardcoded customer), tests/pytest/test_item_bag_and_partial_dispatch.py (expects 2 dispatches but same-day-same-customer merge produces 1 — current deliberate design), test_iteration_16_pricing_report.py::test_dispatch_execute_enriches_pricing (server intentionally does NOT auto-compute total_value — comment at server.py:1565), test_iteration_18_bulk_and_ledger.py::test_ledger_user_forbidden + test_slip_admin_and_user (server intentionally allows operator to view dispatch-ledger + slip — see docstring at server.py:1723).
(Optional, low-priority) Migrate `@app.on_event` to FastAPI lifespan handlers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3397 lines (monolith) — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules: auth.py, customers.py, orders.py, dispatch.py, payments.py, suppliers.py, voice.py, settings.py.

Some endpoints (e.g. `/api/admin/dispatch-ledger`, `/api/admin/dispatch-ledger/{id}/slip`) are namespaced under `/admin/` but use `get_current_user` (any auth user) instead of `require_admin`. The URL prefix is misleading; either rename or restrict.
GET `/api/suppliers` is callable by any auth user even though the review brief lists suppliers as admin-only. Either restrict to admin or update the spec.

Multiple tests reference an obsolete seed customer ID `c823afd1-...` — seed function should either restore that fixed UUID on startup OR existing tests should be rewritten to seed their own data. Currently the startup seeds default customers with fresh UUIDs.
Voice parsing helper exists but is not exposed via HTTP — looks like an oversight when the repo was restructured. Add `/api/voice/parse`.
Pydantic v2 deprecation: `error.url` field is on Pydantic 2.13, which is fine, but consider replacing legacy `@app.on_event` with `lifespan`.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_realistic_smoke_iter1.py (NEW — 28 passing + 1 xfail covering the realistic e2e flow without stale seed assumptions)

success_rate.backend: 97% (28/29 realistic-smoke pass; 1 xfail = the real bug /api/voice/parse missing). Repo pytest suite: 212/240 pass = 88%, all 28 failures investigated and are stale-fixture not backend bugs except voice/parse.

test_credentials: Admin: admin / admin123 — Operator: user / user123 (verified working via POST /api/auth/login; `email` field accepts username).
seed_data_creation: All test fixtures (customers, orders, dispatches, payments, suppliers, supplier-purchases, supplier-payments) created dynamically with TEST_ prefix and torn down on session end. Database state preserved across runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://fetch-and-build.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_realistic_smoke_iter1.py -v` for a clean realistic regression. The legacy /app/backend/tests/test_payments.py, test_dispatch_ledger_v2.py, test_dispatch_edit_delete_v26.py, test_iteration_21_private_mark.py, tests/pytest/test_item_bag_and_partial_dispatch.py, test_iteration_16_pricing_report.py (one test), test_iteration_18_bulk_and_ledger.py (two tests) ALL have stale fixtures — do NOT treat their failures as backend bugs until the main agent either updates them or restores the legacy seed customer. After main agent adds /api/voice/parse, remove the xfail in test_realistic_smoke_iter1.py::TestVoice::test_voice_parse_text and assert a 200 with parsed items.

rca_of_the_issue.voice_parse_missing: Reproduction: `curl -X POST $BASE/api/voice/parse -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"5 side stand"}' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <admin>'` returns 404 `{"detail":"Not Found"}`. Root cause: only `@api_router.post("/voice/transcribe")` is registered (server.py:2281). The helper `parse_voice_order_with_items()` (server.py:2549) is fully implemented but never exposed via HTTP. Mitigation: add `@api_router.post("/voice/parse")` that takes a Pydantic body `{text: str, customer_hint: Optional[str] = None}` and returns `{parsed_items: [...], parsed_customer: {...}}` by calling the existing helper.
rca_of_the_issue.stale_seed_fixture_failures: Reproduction: any test that references `SEED_CUSTOMER_ID = 'c823afd1-8758-4d3e-a693-63a3a1c4738c'` returns 404 because the fresh DB seed creates default customers with random UUIDs. Root cause: tests written against a previous snapshot of seed data. Mitigation: either (a) update the seed function in server.py to deterministically create a customer with id 'c823afd1-...', or (b) rewrite the offending tests to create their own customer via POST /api/customers before assertions (preferred — exactly what test_realistic_smoke_iter1.py does).
